sections.title: Base
sections.odds: 600 cards, including 100 high-number short prints. · Overall SP Odds (#501-600) - 1:1.5 Hobby/Retail/Blaster; 2:1 Fat Pack. · PARALLEL CARDS: Silver (1:3 H/F; 1:6 R/B), Gold Border Glossy (1:24 H/F; 1:48 R/B), · WRAPPER REDEMPTION PARALLELS: Red (5 per pack), Blank Back (1 per pack).

sections.title: Base Retro
sections.odds: Overall odds - 1:0.75 Hobby; 1:3 Retail/Blaster; 2:1 Fat Pack. · PARALLEL CARDS: Black #/100 (Hobby), No Name/Scratch-Off SSP (Unannounced).

sections.title: Minis
sections.odds: 77 cards, including 27 short prints (SP/SSP). · Overall base odds - 1:5.1 Hobby/Retail; 1:10.2 Blaster; 1:6.8 Fat Pack. · SP odds - 1:25.6 Hobby/Retail; 1:51.2 Blaster; 1:34.1 Fat Pack. · SSP odds - 1:64 Hobby/Retail; 1:128 Blaster; 1:85.3 Fat Pack. · PARALLEL CARDS: Black (Base - 1:8 Blaster; SP - 1:38 Blasters; SSP - 1:96 Blasters), Back Variation #/27 (Hobby).

sections.title: Manufactured Hall of Fame Patches
sections.odds: 10 cards, including 2 short prints. · Overall Patch odds - 1:96 Hobby. · HOF odds - 1:2,250. · HOF SP odds - 1:18,750.

sections.title: Manufactured Team Logo Patch Update
sections.odds: Overall Patch odds - 1:96 Hobby. · Logo Update odds - 1:1,125.
